title: Grilled Lamb Skewers Italian-Style
description: A flavorful and colorful Italian-inspired dish featuring marinated lamb skewers, perfect for a summer evening.

ingredients.name: Skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, garlic, salt, black pepper, and Italian seasoning.
2. Add the lamb cubes and marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
4. Thread the marinated lamb, olives, and onion onto the skewers.
5. Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb reaches 145°F (63°C) for medium-rare.
7. Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
8. Garnish with fresh oregano and serve hot.
